title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at MakeMyTrip

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at MakeMyTrip
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? MakeMyTrip in Meerut offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About MakeMyTrip:
MakeMyTrip is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MakeMyTrip!
